name: Moonshine ASR (Useful Sensors)
pricing_notes: Open source (CC BY 4.0); Useful Sensors; English-only

auth.notes: Local inference; HuggingFace Hub model download

performance.notes: 5x faster than Whisper-tiny with better accuracy; designed for real-time CPU inference

agent_readiness.notes: Ultra-efficient English ASR model optimized for edge/CPU deployment. Two sizes: Tiny (~27MB) and Base (~62MB). 5x faster than Whisper Tiny with better accuracy on English. Streaming/real-time capable. Designed for voice assistants, IoT, embedded devices. CC BY 4.0 license. ONNX and TFLite export. Under 1% CPU on Raspberry Pi 5. Outperforms Whisper-tiny/small on English benchmarks at much smaller model size.

gotchas: Newer project — less production-tested than Whisper
Limited context understanding vs larger models
best_when: Real-time English ASR on CPU/edge devices (Raspberry Pi, microcontrollers)
Voice assistants needing sub-500ms latency without GPU
When Whisper is too slow or large for deployment
summary: Moonshine is an ultra-efficient English ASR model from Useful Sensors optimized for edge/CPU deployment. 5x faster than Whisper-tiny with better accuracy. Two sizes (27MB/62MB). Under 1% CPU on Raspberry Pi 5. Streaming/real-time capable. ONNX and TFLite export. Best for voice assistants and IoT needing fast English ASR without GPU. English-only limitation.
